scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.check:api: npm run lint:api && npm run typecheck:api && npm run test:api
scripts.codegen:api: cd api && python scripts/export_openapi.py && cd ../web && npm run codegen:api
